name: Neon-Plasma Biomechanical Hive
description: A hyper-organic, biomechanical labyrinth of pulsing neon circuitry and breathing metallic tissue that spawns luminescent plasma-spores reacting to ambient cosmic frequencies.

params.name: Hive Breathing Speed
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Neon Intensity
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Spore Density
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Magnetic Pull
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
